ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "content_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the content type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the content type (e.g., journal, conference proceedings) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the publication title */,
  "issn" TEXT /* ISSN of the publication */,
  "e_issn" TEXT /* E-ISSN of the publication */,
  "publication_range_start" TEXT /* Start date of the publication range */,
  "publication_range_end" TEXT /* End date of the publication range */,
  "shortcut_url" TEXT /* Shortcut URL for accessing the publication */,
  "archive_url" TEXT /* Archive URL for the publication */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the publication */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary editor of the publication */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary reviewer of the publication */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the publication is open access */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the publication was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the publisher's website */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the publisher is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication being scheduled */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the schedule entry */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor assigned to the publication */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer assigned to the publication */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication schedule */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the schedule entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_schedules_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_schedules_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_schedules_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "editor_name" TEXT /* Name of the editor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the editor */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the editor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the editor is currently active */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Date the editor last logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the reviewer */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the reviewer is currently active */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Date the reviewer last logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manuscripts" (
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manuscript */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication the manuscript is submitted to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the manuscript */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author submitting the manuscript */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the manuscript was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the manuscript */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the manuscript was last modified */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer assigned to the manuscript */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manuscripts_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the author is currently active */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Date the author last logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manuscript being commented on */,
  "commenter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commenter */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment is private */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent comment, if this is a reply to another comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_commenter_id FOREIGN KEY ("commenter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "manuscript_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manuscript being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_text" TEXT /* Text of the revision */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the revision */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer who approved or rejected the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_manuscript_id FOREIGN KEY ("manuscript_id") REFERENCES manuscripts ("manuscript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "digital_rights" (
  "digital_right_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each digital right */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication with DRM */,
  "drm_type" TEXT /* Type of DRM (e.g., encryption, watermarking) */,
  "drm_date" TEXT /* Date the DRM was applied */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the DRM is set to expire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the DRM */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("digital_right_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_digital_rights_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication with access control */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the access control was applied */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the access control is set to expire */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access control */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., author, editor, reviewer) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user is currently active */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Date the user last logged into the system */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publication being analyzed */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric being measured (e.g., views, downloads) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the metric */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
